sections.heading: Status
sections.content:
Phase: planning
Baseline SHA: 713a186b24745e7e000764df68d93d4cad9f75f4
Started: 2026-03-23
Cycle ID: pev-2026-03-23-adr010-nested-sections

Phase transitions:
- planning: 2026-03-23 — cycle created

sections.heading: Request
sections.content: Implement the remaining ADR-010 nested sections features: (1) cortex_add_section MCP tool, (2) dot-path section ID resolution in cortex_update_section and cortex_add_link, (3) new_id rename parameter on cortex_update_section with child cascade, (4) depth validation in cortex_write_doc, (5) LINKED_STALE propagation for parent doc sections with stale children, (6) parent_id/depth fields in viz render_doc_api. Tests already exist in tests/test_nested_sections.py — all 11 currently-failing tests must pass.

sections.heading: Scope
sections.content:
Modules affected: `cortex/mcp_server.py` (MCP tools), `cortex/index/staleness.py` (composite inheritance), `cortex/viz/server.py` (render_doc_api), `cortex/index/db.py` (get_doc_sections ordering).

Scope decision: Single-feature. All changes implement remaining items from ADR-010 (nested DocJSON sections). The scanner and schema layers (Layers 1-2) were already implemented in a prior cycle. This cycle completes Layers 3-5: staleness propagation, MCP tool enhancements, and viz backend support.
